content.content: I want to buy a MacBook, but it's too expensive. I remember using a large discount on a previous order. Could you compare that old discount with my current one? If the previous one was better, please refund that order and apply the refunded discount to this MacBook purchase to make it as cheap as possible.

<function_thought>
To complete the user's request, I need to execute several functions sequentially. First, I will check for available discounts to compare them. After that, I need to view the order history to identify any previous orders that might have had a significant discount. Then, I will retrieve the invoice for the relevant order to see the details of the discount. Lastly, if the previous discount is better, I will proceed to refund that order and search for the MacBook to purchase it with the discount.

I will start by viewing available discounts.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[view_available_discounts()]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

Available Discount Codes:
- Code: SPRING10, Percentage: 90.0%
